programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.sub-title: ATL Homicide - Cold and Complex: Charles Boyer
programme.desc: A botched robbery one man dead and his girlfriend traumatized. Quinn and Vince learn that this is a string of increasingly violent crimes across Atlanta and must bring down a gang of emboldened criminals to save more people from similar fates.

programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.sub-title: ATL Homicide - Tafari Myers
programme.desc: In a first for the detectives, Quinn and Vince must prove a young male found dead in South Carolina was actually killed in ATL. A bloodied eyewitness, an active kidnapping and a mystery suspect leads them to uncover a twisted tale of deadly good fun.

programme.title: Payback
programme.sub-title: Payback - Cycle of Violence
programme.desc: When an aspiring rapper is shot down in broad daylight after leaving a peace rally, Baltimore police believe the murder is related to a shooting earlier that day, and their worst fears are realized as more revenge killings occur.

programme.title: Sins of the City
programme.sub-title: Sins of the City - Miami, Florida
programme.desc: Miami�s dark side is exposed when a botched burglary takes the life of star NFL player Sean Taylor. Due to a tragic miscalculation, five would-be thieves become murderers with one fatal gunshot, leaving the city to mourn their beloved hometown hero.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Casualty of Love
programme.desc: When an Army sergeant home on leave is gun downed on New Year’s Eve, police suspect the straight-arrow soldier may have been killed over beef with someone from his past. But an unexpected tip puts investigators on the trail of an off-limits romance.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Senseless Slaying
programme.desc: When a young mother is found stabbed over 30 times, police wonder, could it be a revenge killing, the act of a jealous ex, or a crime of passion by a current lover?

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Over the Edge
programme.desc: When a young mother disappears after her recent struggles with post-partum depression, her family fears the worst. But when her body is found at the bottom of a cliff, they wonder, did she take her own life � or did someone take it from her?

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - LaCarla McCarty/Akeita Harden
programme.desc: In Wyoming, Michigan, single parent LaCarla McCarty finds love in a slick talking ex-con. But when they fall on hard times, she goes along with his deadly plan for fast cash. Then in Pennsylvania, after falling for a drug dealer, Akeita Harden will do anything to hold onto her man and lavish lifestyle.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Amber Reeve/Kumari Fulbright
programme.desc: When book smart, Amber Reeve�s jailhouse romance turns deadly she must decide if her newfound love is worth more than her freedom. Later, beauty queen, Kumari Fulbright�s, dream of becoming a lawyer crumbles when a dangerous love triangle unravels.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Abby Kemp/Cierra Jacobs
programme.desc: Abby Kemp falls for a man who introduces her to the thrills of high stakes robbery, but the dangerous lifestyle catches up with the Georgia peach, fast. In Houston, faced with losing their rent-free lifestyle, teen mom Cierra Jacobs and her boyfriend lash out at the one man who showed them kindness.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Jemeker Thompson/Haley Mckibben
programme.desc: When Jemeker Thompson falls for an LA baller, she takes the throne as Queen Pin. But after rising to the top of an illicit game, only love can strike her down. And later in Indianapolis, Haley Mckibben lives on her own terms, until she falls for a bad-boy who leads her into a world of violence and deceit.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Brenda Humphrey/Jinea Ingram
programme.desc: Brenda Humphrey falls for a man with a criminal past. But when things don�t go as planned, she goes to great lengths to keep her man happy. And later, Jinea Ingram never wants for a great time, until she falls for a man who assigns her to his thievish plan.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - From Redemption to Revenge
programme.desc: An ex-con�s redemption is cut short when he�s found shot in his home. Police learn - that his girlfriend is also missing and may be a second victim. Did his past finally catch - up to him? Or is this the fatal final act in a volatile relationship?

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Never Saw It Coming
programme.desc: When a woman is found with a single gunshot wound to her head, her family is shocked. A free spirit and devoted mother, she loved life. As detectives dig, they question if her happiness was just a fa�ade, or if her death was by someone else�s hand.

programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.sub-title: ATL Homicide - Cold and Complex: Charles Boyer
programme.desc: A botched robbery one man dead and his girlfriend traumatized. Quinn and Vince learn that this is a string of increasingly violent crimes across Atlanta and must bring down a gang of emboldened criminals to save more people from similar fates.

programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.sub-title: ATL Homicide - Tafari Myers
programme.desc: In a first for the detectives, Quinn and Vince must prove a young male found dead in South Carolina was actually killed in ATL. A bloodied eyewitness, an active kidnapping and a mystery suspect leads them to uncover a twisted tale of deadly good fun.

programme.title: Payback
programme.sub-title: Payback - Cycle of Violence
programme.desc: When an aspiring rapper is shot down in broad daylight after leaving a peace rally, Baltimore police believe the murder is related to a shooting earlier that day, and their worst fears are realized as more revenge killings occur.

programme.title: Sins of the City
programme.sub-title: Sins of the City - Miami, Florida
programme.desc: Miami�s dark side is exposed when a botched burglary takes the life of star NFL player Sean Taylor. Due to a tragic miscalculation, five would-be thieves become murderers with one fatal gunshot, leaving the city to mourn their beloved hometown hero.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - At The Water's Edge
programme.desc: When a mother of three disappears in the middle of the night, her boyfriend and children have little to offer police. Will a mysterious friend be able to lead them to her? Or will the search for her end on the banks of a raging river?

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - In Too Deep
programme.desc: When the bodies of a missing couple surface in the waters of New Orleans, detectives wonder who could have committed this heinous crime. Their investigation leads them to a young woman who was so desperate, she�d do anything for her man.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Circle of Trust
programme.desc: A close-knit community is gripped with fear after two families are found brutally murdered. Police work to unravel the mystery and are led down a terrifying trail of violent lies, proving you can�t trust anyone, even the ones you love the most.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Love on the Run
programme.desc: When a young model meets a charming, handsome man on the heels of losing her father, her future suddenly seems brighter. But soon, she finds herself following him down a dark road, destroying anyone who gets in their way � all in the name of love.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Lost in Loyalty
programme.desc: A heartbroken young mother is elated to get a second chance at love when she meets the man of her dreams � until she discovers her new lover has a dark side. Before long, she finds her life launched into chaos when she sets out to prove she�s the ride-or-die woman that her man demands.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Loving in Fear
programme.desc: Friends and family are stunned when a beautiful college student drops everything to run away with her new man. When she suddenly returns home nine months later, she reveals the shocking story of a brutal murder, notorious drug kingpin, and the destructive desire at the center of her secret life.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Ride or Die
programme.desc: A truck driver vanishes just months into her marriage, and detectives wonder if she�s having second thoughts. However, crucial evidence points investigators toward a sinister plot spanning multiple states that ends with a horrific discovery.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Scratching the Surface
programme.desc: A sixteen-year-old boy comes home to find his mother dead in a pool of blood. After learning that she may have had a stalker, police begin searching widely for the mystery man, only to discover that her killer is someone very close to home.

programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.sub-title: ATL Homicide - Eric Honea
programme.desc: A man is found murdered in his truck in Northwest Atlanta, and Quinn and Vince are on the case. But when one eyewitness contradicts another, the detectives will have to sift through fact and fiction to bring this killer to justice.

programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.sub-title: ATL Homicide - Lacharity Gaines
programme.desc: When a detective in New York calls Atlanta Police about a case, Quinn and Vince take the call. In doing so, the detectives reopen a cold case about a woman found dead in her apartment. To catch this killer, they'll need to take a trip to New York.

programme.title: Payback
programme.sub-title: Payback - Three’s A Crowd
programme.desc: After a woman miraculously survives 17 gunshot wounds, Bellwood, Illinois police, aided by witness statements and video surveillance, uncover a triangle of romance, rage and revenge.
